news.t: Pacer ETFs Announces Fee Reduction on Four Funds
Pacer ETFs Celebrates Banner Year of Growth in 2022, Crosses $20B to Kickoff New Year
Pacer ETFs Celebrates 7th Birthday, Year of Rapid Growth Amid Market Challenges
Pacer ETFs Launches BULD, Targeting Opportunities in ‘The Fourth Industrial Revolution'

holdings.infoBox: BULD is an equity ETF with a total of 61 individual holdings. The top holdings are Lam Research stock at 10.36%, Applied Materials at 10.29%, ASML Holding at 9.89%, Proto Labs at 9.04%, and KLA Corporation at 6.91%.

overview.description: The Pacer BlueStar Engineering the Future ETF (BULD) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the BlueStar Robotics & 3D Printing index. The fund tracks a modified market cap-weighted index of equities that provides global exposure to robotics and 3D printing. BULD was launched on May 4, 2022 and is issued by Pacer.

data.title: Pacer ETFs Announces Fee Reduction on Four Funds
data.text: MALVERN, Pa.--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $BULD--Pacer ETFs to reduce fees on four funds.

data.text: MALVERN, Pa.--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #AUM--Pacer ETFs celebrates 7th birthday surpassing $15 billion in assets under management

data.title: Pacer ETFs Launches BULD, Targeting Opportunities in ‘The Fourth Industrial Revolution'
data.text: MALVERN, Pa.--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $BULD #3Dprinting--Pacer ETFs launches BULD, providing exposure to robotics or manufacturing equipment, CAD software, or 3D printing products and material providers.
